_meta.purpose: CI fingerprint check enforcing the D1/D2 clean-room posture (CLAUDE.md L18-19, docs/attribution.md). Each entry is a distinctive multi-word phrase lifted verbatim from one of the upstream skill bundles we MUST NOT paraphrase from. The integration test in tests/integration/test_no_upstream_substrings.py walks every skills/**/SKILL.md and fails the build if any 'block' phrase appears verbatim. Phrases are chosen to be (a) long enough to be unlikely-by-chance in independent prose, (b) distinctive of the upstream's own voice, (c) not so generic that they false-positive on technical terminology.

fields.phrase: exact substring; case-sensitive match (lowered both sides at search time)
fields.upstream: short repo identifier; populates the failure message
fields.why: free-text rationale — why this phrase is distinctive enough to flag

fingerprints.phrase: Step 0 -- Check shared data cache
fingerprints.why: Distinctive seo-* SKILL.md preamble using a double-dash separator unusual in markdown headings

fingerprints.phrase: Before every DataForSEO MCP call
fingerprints.why: Specific cost-guardrail prose used at the head of seo-dataforseo's cost section

fingerprints.phrase: the DataForSEO MCP server
fingerprints.why: Frequent in upstream; could legitimately appear in our docs but worth flagging

fingerprints.phrase: 1 credit = 1 page crawled or scraped
fingerprints.why: Verbatim Firecrawl pricing prose from seo-firecrawl/SKILL.md

fingerprints.phrase: Map operations are cheaper
fingerprints.why: Specific Firecrawl cost prose phrasing

fingerprints.phrase:
On-Page SEO
- Title tag: 50-60 characters
fingerprints.why: Specific opening of the seo-page audit checklist with our literal newline shape

fingerprints.phrase: Group keywords by initial intent guess (reduces pairwise comparisons)
fingerprints.why: Verbatim SERP-overlap optimization prose from seo-cluster/SKILL.md step 2

fingerprints.phrase: Same post | Merge into single target page
fingerprints.why: Specific cell phrasing from the SERP-overlap threshold table; the table values themselves (7-10/4-6/2-3/0-1) are factual constants we reuse, but the cell prose is upstream voice

fingerprints.phrase: With 40 keywords, full pairwise = 780 comparisons
fingerprints.why: Distinctive optimization-heuristic prose from seo-cluster

fingerprints.phrase: Cannibalization check
fingerprints.why: Generic SEO term but upstream uses as a literal section heading; flag for awareness

fingerprints.phrase: Every post must have minimum 3 incoming internal links
fingerprints.why: Specific internal-link minimum prose from seo-cluster step 5

fingerprints.phrase: act as a firm sounding board, not a sycophant
fingerprints.why: Iconic Cody voice prose; per the strip map this exact phrasing is one of the canonical fingerprints

fingerprints.phrase: firm sounding board
fingerprints.why: Shorter form of the above; load-bearing distinctive phrase

fingerprints.phrase: Each phase has an iteration loop
fingerprints.why: Distinctive opening describing Cody's phase structure

fingerprints.phrase: Light: A few key sources for credibility (1-5 sources)
fingerprints.why: Verbatim depth-tier prose from research-workflow.md

fingerprints.phrase: Heavy: Extensively researched, most claims cited (12-20 sources)
fingerprints.why: Verbatim depth-tier heavy-tier prose

fingerprints.phrase: It's important to note that...
fingerprints.why: Cody quotes this as an AI-tell example; it's also a real AI-tell that we may want to mention. Warn-only so we can use it in editor-skill examples with care.

fingerprints.phrase: It's worth mentioning that...
fingerprints.why: Same as above — appears in cody's AI-tell list

fingerprints.phrase: Goal: Help the user produce their best work, not make them feel good
fingerprints.why: Distinctive Cody collaboration-principles closer

fingerprints.phrase: Drafts are JSON files tracking article progress
fingerprints.why: Cody's draft-state preamble; we use SQLite, not JSON files

fingerprints.phrase: Always create `-editorpass.md` as a new file. Never overwrite the original.
fingerprints.why: Distinctive editor-style-guide.md filesystem-discipline prose; we use article.setEdited against the SQLite column, no `-editorpass.md` filename in our world

fingerprints.phrase: Liberal use of single-sentence paragraphs for impact
fingerprints.why: Verbatim editor-style-guide visual-breaks calibration prose

fingerprints.phrase: vary with "Also," "Beyond this," or restructure
fingerprints.why: Distinctive transition-replacement guidance from editor-style-guide.md AI-tell pass

fingerprints.phrase: Cody acts as a firm sounding board
fingerprints.why: Iconic SKILL.md collaboration-principles framing; covers the subject-verb form of the sounding-board phrase that the standalone substring would miss
